game.title: Glory to SCALE
game.short_text: Sometimes the fate of an entire country depends on one decision. Make this decision

details.title: Glory to SCALE
details.description:
You are one of those who live in a totalitarian state called SCALE. Life goes on peacefully and safely for all residents thanks to the Ministry of Truth and many cameras. At least that's what the media say. Whether this is really the case, you will have to figure it out, taking on the role of just who is watching the observers.

— Two endings that depend on your decisions
— Gripping storyline with unexpected plot-twist
— A wide variety of sounds that complement the story
— Several gameplay mechanics at once

game.title: Arithmometer
game.short_text: Master the numbers, conquer the challenges, and rise to the top.

details.title: Arithmometer
details.description:
Immerse yourself in the dynamic world of Arithmometer, a captivating card-playing and deck-building game that seamlessly blends strategy, quick thinking, and arcade-style excitement. Engage in four unique games, all of which are played with the same deck, and each presenting its own set of challenges, as you strive to achieve high scores and climb the ranks on the online leaderboard.
Between levels, enhance your gaming capabilities by acquiring new cards and choosing from a variety of abilities that can turn the tide in your favour and provide the edge needed to conquer increasingly difficult challenges.---Quite a few individuals have expressed concerns about not fully grasping the rules of each game — perhaps they accidentally skip the tutorials or simply don't pay enough attention to them. To address this, here are concise summaries for each game mode.
Ascension/Descent:
This game mode is likely the most straightforward, as the main rule is displayed on the screen at all times. Your objective is to achieve a target number using the selected cards, and later on, subtraction becomes an option as well.
You can freely move any open cards to empty spots on the field (but can't put them back on the mountain). However, be cautious, as moving a card to an empty spot resets your multiplier.
Strikes are issued for each row of unopened cards at the end.
Balancing Act:
In this mode, there are two slots for adding cards. Your goal is to minimize the difference between the sums of all cards in each pile. Aim for a zero difference to increase your multiplier; if the difference exceeds 10, the multiplier resets.
Strikes are assigned based on the difference between the scales at the end, capped at the level number to avoid excessive early penalties.
Running the Scales:
Engage in a turn-based duel against an opponent. Play cards with values equal to or higher than the card on the pile. Playing a card of the same value reverses the goal, requiring smaller value cards. The playing direction is indicated by an arrow next to the play pile.
If a player can't play a card, their opponent receives a tick, the playing direction flips, and they get another turn.
Reversing the playing direction increases your multiplier, resetting only if your opponent gains a tick.
The game concludes when a player runs out of cards or reaches 5 ticks. Strikes are given based on the difference in tick counts.
Descale:
Simplicity defines this mode, yet it often leads to confusion. Select a root card and surrounding cards that add up to or subtract the same value. As shown in the picture.

Cards drop down to fill empty spots as long as cards remain in your deck. Strikes are issued for all cards left in your deck, including unflipped ones at the top of a lane.

game.title: Squirveillance
game.short_text: You're not nuts if they're really after you.

details.title: Squirveillance
details.description:
🏆Ranked #8 Overall in Game Off Jam 2023🏆In an alternate timeline in the 90's, you are being watched constantly. Can a regular squirrel like you put together the clues from CCTV footage and find the suspects that threaten public order?
Use your nutty assistant to scan and enhance photos, just like on your favourite crime TV show! It's time to zoom in.


Controls and Walkthrough
ActionKeyboard + MouseControllerPan aroundW/S/A/DLeft stickZoomScrollwheel up / downor Arrow keys up / downLT / RTScan!Left clickAEnhance!Right clickXSwitch filesQ/ELB / RBShow hintMiddle clickLSB (thumbstick press)
If you're stuck in the game, pay attention to the hourglass icon and the sound your computer makes. They will appear when you're looking at an area that can be scanned. You can also middle click or press the thumbstick to make scannable areas appear briefly.
Here's a video walkthrough if you're stuck at any point (if you feel like you're doing the right thing, but still can't progress, let us know - you might have found a game-breaking bug!)



Here's a step-by-step walkthrough to progress through the game:
BriefingScan the mission brief. This should unlock a new file that you can switch to (see  Controls).
First photo, part 1In the city view scene, press the Enhance button when you're hovering over the squirrels on the bench. This should reveal a more detailed image!
First photo, part 2Enhance the graffiti behind the squirrels, AND the flyer to the right of the bench, with an acorn on it.
Second photo, part 1There are two spots to enhance here - one is the table closest to you with three squirrels around it, the other is the exchange between the bartender and squirrel on the left.
Second photo, part 2You need to have three things scanned - the bartender's glasses, they keys coming out of his pocket, and the slip of paper on the table you've previously enhanced.
Thirt photo, part 1Scan three things - the squirrel with the shiny mask at reception, the sad squirrel in the first row of chairs with an anti-AI sign, and the slogans on the empty chair in the back row. This unlocks a higher zoom.
Third photo, part 2Zoom all the way in to the door at the far end of the hallway, and enhance the left window.
Third photo, part 3Scan the face of the bandaged squirrel on the hospital bed, THEN the medical history hanging at the front of her bed, and FINALLY the phone on her bedside table. Zoom closer if you need to.
???, part 1Keep zooming out, out of the computer, and once you've seen the office, continue zooming out until your character says "Holy..."
???, part 2Examine all three dialogue options. You will then be taken to the pinboard.
FinaleThe only thing left is to scan every picture on the board.


Credits
Miranda Bennett Margrave - Lead Artist, 2D and 3D Environments, Squirrel and Office Models, Animation, Dialogue Assistance

Mikolaj "Nick" Gackowski - Core Systems Design and Programming, Narrative Technician, UI Design & Art, Music and Sound, Dialogue Assistance

Sarah Masters - Narrative Lead, Puzzle Design, Particle and Shader Effects

Georgi Tsaklev - Input System, Audio Programming, 3D Scene Setup

It you're downloading the Windows version:
Run Squirveillance.exe to play the game.Press Alt+Enter to switch fullscreen setting.Press Alt+F4 to quit.

game.title: a Waltz in SPACE
game.short_text: A gravity based space game to calm down.

details.title: a Waltz in SPACE
details.description:
[CONTROLS]: (Preferred Mouse Controls)
use your MOUSE and CLICK on planets to select OR use LEFT and RIGHT ARROW keys to circle around the selected planets. 
use SCROLL WHEEL to change the SCALE of the planets OR use UP and DOWN ARROW keys.

[ABOUT THE GAME]:

You are the captain of a spaceship, surrounded by a calm and relaxing waltz. Your mission is to collect all the energy balls and return to the base. However, moving your ship requires a unique skill – scaling up or down the planets.

A bigger planet exerts a stronger gravitational force, pulling you in. A smaller planet leaves you floating around. Strategize your moves wisely as you navigate this gravitational dance.

Will you manage to explore all the galaxies?

My YouTube channel: youtube.com/@zandraz1594

game.title: Tower of  Cat-astrophe
game.short_text: Best try to keep things purrfectly balanced, things get a bit chaotic with all these kitties on the loose.

details.title: Tower of  Cat-astrophe
details.description:
For an optimal experience, click on the fullscreen button at the bottom right of the screen!
A cute, if slightly chaotic, cat game made by a team taking part in Game Off Jam 2023,  from the 1st November - 1st December 2023.

- Left Click : Pick up cat
    
- Right Click or Mouse wheel with a cat picked up : Rotate cat
            
Tower of  Cat-astrophe 
Oh no! The cat cannon's gone rogue and kitties are falling from  the sky, let’s put them on the balance tree over there. Watch out,  they'll cause chaos if they get down!

Tower of Cat-astrophe is  a physics-based puzzle game where you have to manage falling cats on  both sides of a scale while scoring as many points as possible.
    
At the end of every round, a new cat type will be shot by the cannon! 
Made for the Game Off Jam 2023 with the theme : Scale

- 22 cats with different abilities. Can you find them all?
- A devilish cat-cannon, It's shooting so many cats everywhere!

- The scratch-o-meter: This cute device let you know when a cat falls off the scales. Keep it in mind while you stack your cats, as if the meter fills up, it's game over!
- The Purrfessor : He's kindly volunteered his time to provide you with insights on how to play the game, with his expansive knowledge in catology, we couldn't think of a better teacher!
          
- The Cat-alogue : Here you can see which cats you discovered during your playthroughs!

Alternate Game Modes!


You can customize your experience with several settings;
-Invicibility: The scratch-o-meter will not increase when a cat falls off the tree.
-Common cats: Only cats without special abilities can spawn
-Tutorial tips: Enabled by default, turn it off if you don't want to see The Purrfessor anymore.
-Unlock all cats: Toggle this and go to the cat-alogue if you want to see all the cats! 
 
Share your score in the comments! 
You can share a wee screenshot of the score in the end screen down there, just hit the insert the image option after you've screenshotted your score:

Let's see who can beat our teammate Sandra's high score of 9170 !


Armand  - Game Designer, Technical Designer
Charlie - UX Designer, UI Artist
Cypri - Programmer
Derek - Audio Designer, QA
El - 2D Artist
Ewan - Programmer
Robyn - Producer
Sandra - 2D Artist
All assets; art, animation, code, design, audio, (except for fonts!) were made during the game jam.

game.title: Immunia
game.short_text: TIC-80 Immunity Puzzle Game - Jam Entry for Game Off 2023

details.title: Immunia
details.description:
Now on Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.bitwisecreative.immunia----"Immunia", a submission to the GitHub Game Off 2023 Jam, is a captivating puzzle game for the TIC-80 platform, offering a mix of strategy and reflexes as you fight for survival.
Perfect for on-the-go gaming, "Immunia" fits your mobile screen and allows you to navigate white blood cells in a microscopic war against bacteria using simple swipe controls. It's easy to play across different devices.

Every swipe matters as you lead white blood cells in tactical battles within a digital world. Outsmart your microscopic opponents and protect your cell's nucleus, while also dealing with a unique battlefield where edges loop around.

Beware, the bacteria multiply every 13 moves, ramping up the difficulty. Strategic thinking will help you overcome the growing threat.

Dive into the dual nature of "Immunia," a game that starts with an easy-to-learn tutorial but unfolds into a strategic quest for those with a passion for tactical gameplay. Play it in your browser, share the fun with friends, and be part of the vibrant indie community celebrating at the GitHub Game Off 2023. Your adventure starts now—happy gaming, future Immunologists!
(Github repo was public until 1/20/2024)

moreInfo.Author: bitwisecreative
moreInfo.Tags: game-off-2023, GitHub, Pixel Art, Retro, TIC-80

game.title: Scaling The Last Mountain - GameOff 2023
game.short_text: Fill your backpack with weapons and fight off hordes of monsters while Scaling the Last Mountain

details.title: Scaling The Last Mountain - GameOff 2023
details.description:
A game made in 30 days for the Game Off 2023 Game Jam.Full release coming to Steam. Wishlist Backpack Survivors now !
 
  
Controls:
  
WASD to Move
  Left Mouse Button to dragScroll to rotateSpace to Dash
  
 
  
The goal and gameplay:
Fill your backpack with powerful items, scale the mountain, survive the waves of enemies and defeat The Terror at The Top !
The method:
The backpack is the place you can place your items in. In the beginning, its rather small, but the further you progress, the bigger it becomes!
Gather backpack extensions and place them properly in order to fit in all the items you want! Be aware though! All extensions change the way you and the enemies scale.
You can buy items during the game to place them in your backpack. Items in the backpack give passive attacks, special abilities or stat bonusses which will scale< your power even further. Make sure the items fit though! Some of them are really big (and strong!)
Once you have prepared your backpack, you take on the waves of the Last Mountain. Between each wave, you are able to expand your backpack further!
Using the powerful weapons prepared, you can survive the waves! 
But be aware! The enemies become stronger, faster and nastier the further you get! They scale in power as well.
 
Can you conquer and scale the last mountain? Only one way to find out! 
  
Good luck on your journey Hero!
  
           We would love to hear your thoughts on our Jam   game so don't forget to leave a comment : )

Folder Brawler, entry for “Game Off 2023” with the theme “SCALE”
Oh shoot! viruses are invading your computer, don't let it FILL UP your last folder, 
An action click-em-up that lets you war against the computer virus using just your… cursor! Can you beat the evil virus lord?
This game is recommended to be play on full screen -

How to Play: Don’t let virus get inside your folder!

Click - at the virus or close ads button to close it! If you clicked at the ads content, another will pop up!Hold Click - at the folder to move it around
and if any virus got through, Double Click - at your folder to open it, and drag the virus out!

The folder scale bigger and bigger every time a virus got in. While also being slowed down.

Welcome, heroes. Dragons have raided the village! Venture into the perilous Dragon’s Deep for glory, riches, and the chance to rescue kidnapped children. Crush fiendish foes to unlock new abilities, fortify your skills, and claim your well-deserved rewards!
-Made for Game Off 2023-


Gameplay
Navigate four stages, each teeming with unique dragons and a menacing boss. Your goal? Reduce their Health Points (HP) to zero with Basic Attacks while simultaneously keeping your HP above zero. Couldn’t be simpler, right? 
But beware of the enemy’s Stagger Points (SP), which reduces the HP damage they receive. Observe the affinity of heroes and enemies to light (sun) or dark (moon). Strike them with the opposite affinity to wipe out their SP and unleash total HP-damaging mayhem!

Heroes and enemies also wield potent Special Abilities! Snag and upgrade them between waves, and deploy them in combat to sway the tides of battle. Special Abilities can strengthen (buff), weaken (debuff), or inflict damage. 

Ever watching, and undoubtedly an aid to your journey - witness the majestic Scale of DestinyTM (*unauthorized use or reproduction prohibited by the sun and moon goddesses). This scale holds the power to give and to take. Use Basic Attacks to acquire light or dark orbs and consume them to execute your Special Abilities. When the scale tips, heroes and enemies of that affinity gain strength. The further it tilts, the mightier their attacks become.
Balance is key, future hero!

But wait, there’s more! Dragon’s Deep is treacherous, and your foes grow mightier. Behold, Ultimate Abilities! Fill all four orbs on the Scale of DestinyTM to strike the final blow or grant your heroes relief.

Venture forth, mighty hero! Armed with this knowledge and power, all eyes are on you to save the children. No pressure. Oh, and don’t forget to collect dragon scales along the way and spend them to revive fallen allies.

Whether you walk in the light or stalk in the shadows, victory, glory, and snotty noses await!

Tools Used
ProcreateUnityAudacitySpine
Created By
Citizen Developers:
Code: Chris Creighton (@creighcl)Art: Michael Ha (@michaelha)Audio: Cole Riggs (@cman1526)Story: Chris Brown (@studiochairo)
*All code & art assets created by Citizen Developers in Nov 2023.

game.title: 🐟 Scale the Fish 🐟
game.short_text: a strategy card game about an otter scaling fish

details.title: 🐟 Scale the Fish 🐟
details.description:
You're a little otter who's got a huge fish order to fill! Work fast to successfully finish your order by the end of the day.

INSTRUCTIONS
Scale fish by playing cards from your hand.  Play a card by dragging it from your hand to the fish.Cards require Time to play. Once you run out, end your turn. At the start of your turn, new cards are drawn and your Time is reset. Each turn after your second, you will need to remove one card from your deck and add one new card to your deck. There are 20 cards in your deck altogether.Fully scale 50 fish in 20 turns to win the game!


In this game you will
Play cards to scale fish 🔪🐟Discover incredible card combinations to scale wildly fast! 💫Find and collect new cards for your deck 🔍 🎴

Prove to everyone in the market you're the best fish scaler in town! 🦦

Embark on a journey as the ancient Mesopotamian king, Gilgamesh, as he battles for power and eternal life through turn-based combat. 
As the gods watch your every move, your decisions can tip the scales of justice and shape your power and destinyDecide how to fight—with the divine fire of Shamash or the alchemy of IshtarTreat your opponents with compassion to appease Shamash or with fury to satisfy Ishtar, or defy the gods and recruit the vanquished to your very own cultBe careful with your choices: Every action can shape your power and destiny
This is an early prototype with an unfinished story. We're excited to be expanding this with a complete story, an endless mode, and completely refreshed gameplay based on tabletop game mechanics.

game.title: Scale Control: A Liquid Experience
game.short_text: Ready, set, jet! Challenge your friend in a game of colorful liquid soccer.

details.title: Scale Control: A Liquid Experience
details.description:
Scale Control: A Liquid Experience
Scale Control is a browser based local competitive two player game where players use jets of liquid to push the ball into their opponent's gate. It was created during the Game Off 2023 game jam. 
Gameplay and Mechanics
Game takes place in a vertical aquarium with a slowly sinking main (white) ball and few power-up balls. Player’s jets are located on the bottom of the play field and gates are located on left and right edges. Players control the direction of the jets and can fire them at will. Players score when they push the main ball into the opponent's gate (one on the opposite side of the player's jet). After scoring, the play field is reset. Game continues indefinitely. 
Ball Scale
Ball will enlarge when it hits the ceiling of the playfield. It will shrink when it hits the bottom of the playfield. The larger the ball is the more difficult it is to control and at some point it will not fit into the gate preventing further scoring. At this point, players are expected to cooperate and let the ball drop to the floor. 
Power-ups
Game contains smaller power-up balls that are activated when pushed into the opponent's game (like the main ball). The (+) power-up will make the player's jet stronger but will also increase the size of their own gate making the player more vulnerable. Similarly, the (-) power-up will make their jet weaker but will also protect the player by shrinking their gate. Power-ups are stackable and will last 10 seconds after activation of the last power-up.
Controls
On keyboard devices, the left player rotates the jet with A D keys and fires the jet with W key. The right player does so with Left Right and Up keys. In-game help menu is available with the Escape key.
On touch devices, players point and fire jets by taping (and holding) on their side of the device.GitHubSee more info on GitHub bienehito/scale-control

moreInfo.Author: bienehito

game.title: The Great Scaler
game.short_text: A game where you weight stuff because you are the Scaler of a small town.

details.title: The Great Scaler
details.description:
The Great Scaler
About the Game 
The Great Scaler is a small game where you play as a lizard Scaler,  who opened a new business in a small town.  You possess precise scales and customers seek your exceptional accuracy and reliability. Will you help them, or will you deceive them?
There are four endings in the game:
1 neutral ending1 good ending2 bad endings
The game was made in Godot and submitted 11 seconds before the deadline. No AI tools were used in the development process. This game was not tested on animals.
Controls

Press LMB to proceed in dialogues
Press RMB to toggle between customer and workspace
Move your Mouse to move your hand when using the scale (the camera will follow)
Hold LMB grab and hold weights (grab them at the top)

About the Author
Hey! My name is John, and this was a lot of firsts for me:


first solo game jam
first project made in Godot
the first 2D game I made art for (first time drawing assets and first time animating)
first-time voice acting (?) 

Unfortunately, I did not deliver everything I had planned, but I hope you'll enjoy this little prototype anyway. Feel free to give me your feedback and I might make it better!
If you are searching for new Game Dev communities, you can join my Discord server.

___________________________________
Credits
Game Design, Programming, Art, Sound Design - me, BigMaexle

___________________________________
This ist size.matter, a short puzzle platformer incoporating the theme "scale". Guide your little guy to the light and use your "Scaling Device" (any similarity between any non-lethal physics-breaking gun-like-device is purely coincidantel) to do that. If you like it, if you dont like ir, or if you think it could be fleshed out to a complete game with some real level, let me know. I hope you have fun and thanks for playing :)

game.title: Fishy Feast
game.short_text: Fishy Feast is a Pac-Man inspired game with stealth elements.

details.title: Fishy Feast
details.description:
Fishy Feast is a Pac-Man inspired game where you play as a fish that has to grow eating smaller preys, while avoiding and hiding from lantern fishes. Once you get big enough, it’s time to eat your predators too! Catch as many fish as you can and get better every run.
  
This project was created in a month for the "Game Off 2023" Game Jam.  The theme was "SCALE". It’s represented in the game by the scale increments of the main character every time you eat little fishes.
  

Controls:
WASD to swim and mouse to rotate camera.
 
  
Made by:
  
Daniel Rodríguez: Designer, UI/UX Programmer (https://www.linkedin.com/in/daniel-rodr%C3%ADguez-d%C3%ADaz/)
Ines Camerlynck: 3D Artist, Character Artist (https://www.linkedin.com/in/ines-camerlynck-garcia/)
Joan Marquès: Programmer, Gameplay Programmer (https://www.linkedin.com/in/joan-marqu%C3%A8s-besses-016481282/) 
Jonay Álvarez: 3D Artist, 3D Animator (https://www.linkedin.com/in/vorremonte/)
Luis Galvez: Composer, Sound Designer (https://www.linkedin.com/in/luis-galvez-805233293/) Extract the .zip file and execute "FishyFeast".
